assertions.description: AudioContext is exposed for WebAudio playback.

assertions.test: (async()=>{const C=AudioContext||webkitAudioContext;const ctx=new C();const stats=ctx.playbackStats;const ok=stats&&stats.constructor&&stats.constructor.name==='AudioPlaybackStats';await ctx.close();return ok;})()

assertions.description: AudioPlaybackStats exposes numeric average, minimum, and maximum latency fields.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const C=AudioContext||webkitAudioContext;const ctx=new C();const stats=ctx.playbackStats;const ok=['averageLatency','minimumLatency','maximumLatency'].every(name=>typeof stats[name]==='number');await ctx.close();return ok;})()

assertions.description: AudioPlaybackStats exposes numeric underrun duration, underrun event, and total duration fields.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const C=AudioContext||webkitAudioContext;const ctx=new C();const stats=ctx.playbackStats;const ok=['underrunDuration','underrunEvents','totalDuration'].every(name=>typeof stats[name]==='number');await ctx.close();return ok;})()

assertions.description: AudioPlaybackStats exposes resetLatency for resetting latency aggregates.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const C=AudioContext||webkitAudioContext;const ctx=new C();const ok=typeof ctx.playbackStats.resetLatency==='function'&&typeof ctx.playbackStats.toJSON==='function';await ctx.close();return ok;})()
